result.thesis: Decomposition, assumption-validation, and exploration improves LLM accuracy

evidence.current_results: 5 benchmarks: 0pp reasoning avg, -15pp recall avg, -10pp commonsense avg

result.pattern: Decomposition helps ONLY low-baseline reasoning (<85%). Hurts recall, commonsense, truthfulness. Neutral on high-baseline (>90%).

context.next_action: Verify BBH and MMLU-alt results when complete

session_summary.progress: 5/7 current batch (71%), need 3 more for O-0008 target of 10

context.notes: Thesis significantly challenged by current results. Only positive evidence (+18pp Synthetic) missing from result set. All 5 completed benchmarks show neutral or negative. BBH (hard reasoning) and MMLU-alt (5 methods) are final tests. If BBH also neutral/negative, thesis needs major revision. Monitoring task bd30rh9cl active.
